# [Clang] Assertion `E->getType()->isPointerType() || E->getType()->isObjCObjectPointerType()` when using array subscript on parameter pack in inline asm

**Author:** Xniao
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/176137
**Status:** Open
**Labels:** clang:codegen, crash, inline-asm, generated by fuzzer

## Body

***Generated by fuzzer.***
Clang trunk crashed and goes back to 5.0 with `-std=c++17` flag.
Compiler Explorer: https://godbolt.org/z/7xKzeEvsK

## Program
```cpp
int main() {
  auto lambda = [](auto &&...args) {
    asm volatile("mov %0, %%rax\n\t" : : "r"(args[0]) : "rax");
  };
  lambda(1);
}
```

## Program
```cpp
int main() {
  auto lambda = [](auto &amp;&amp;...args) {
    asm volatile("mov %0, %%rax\n\t" : : "r"(args[0]) : "rax");
  };
  lambda(1);
}
```
